# [CogniTeck - Boutique Software Engineering](https://cogniteck.com/)

CogniTeck is an agile software engineering agency of 3 experienced full-stack developers building high-performance custom web applications, SaaS products, and business automation systems.

## Services
- [Landing Pages](https://cogniteck.com/#services): High-conversion layouts with direct [WhatsApp Integrations](https://wa.me/519891216130).
- [Corporate Websites](https://cogniteck.com/#services): Professional presentation sites optimized for [SEO](https://cogniteck.com/).
- [Custom Systems](https://cogniteck.com/#services): Custom databases, operations management, and business portals.
- [Process Automation](https://cogniteck.com/#services): API connections and workflow automation (Make, Zapier, Bots).
- [Custom SaaS](https://cogniteck.com/#services): Multi-tenant subscription cloud applications.
- [Support & Care](https://cogniteck.com/#services): Continuous [WhatsApp Support](https://wa.me/519891216130), backups, and cloud monitoring.

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: [Next.js (React)](https://cogniteck.com/), [Tailwind CSS](https://cogniteck.com/)
- Languages: [TypeScript](https://cogniteck.com/), [JavaScript](https://cogniteck.com/)
- Backend & DB: [PostgreSQL](https://cogniteck.com/), Node.js, secure REST APIs
- Integrations: [WhatsApp API](https://wa.me/519891216130), payment gateways (Stripe), local billing (SUNAT)

## Contact & Estimations
- [Official Site](https://cogniteck.com/)
- [Project Estimations Form](https://cogniteck.com/#contact)
